text:
The managed 
care records are identified as those where the claim type code (CLM_TYPE_CD) = 3, C, or W. 

• If CLM_TYPE_CD = (1, A, U) then the amount paid by the state or their fiscal agent to a provider is 
found in the line Medicaid Paid Amount (LINE_MDCD_PD_AMT) and the Total Amount Paid By 
Medicaid (MDCD_PD_AMT, found on the header claim) variables. 

• If CLM_TYPE_CD = (2, B, V) then the amount paid by the state or their fiscal agent to a managed 
care plan is found in the MDCD_PD_AMT
